title: Clean Redstone - extra components
description: Gives a clean look to more redstone components
body:
If you want to publish a project containing my work, please mention my username "Vunyx" somewhere. Also, a link to my project would be much appreciated.

# Description
This resource pack gives a **clean look** to more redstone redstone components.
It is intended to be used in combination with my other pack [Clean Redstone - main components](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/clean-redstone-main-components).

The affected blocks are:
- redstone ore
- redstone lamp
- redstone block
- target block
- slime block
- honey block
- note block
- observer
- dispenser
- dropper
- crafter
- hopper
- lever
- piston
- sticky piston
- furnace

If you also want the rails to follow the same clean look, you can download my other pack [Clean Redstone - rails and minecarts](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/clean-redstone-rails-and-minecarts).

![comparison between vanilla and the pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16ea95ada2becfb981e71336ad47fbf342710bfe.png)

# How to install
After downloading the resource pack, go to **options -> resource packs** and click the **Open Pack Folder** button, or open `%appdata%\.minecraft\resourcepacks` directly. Put the resource pack in this folder. It should then show up under **Available**. Click the arrow to switch it to the **Selected** tab and click **Done**. That's it, the pack should now be installed properly.
